title: Mission Destination Systems
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM MissionAccepted WHERE DestinationSystem IS NOT NULL AND DestinationSystem != '' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT DestinationSystem AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM MissionAccepted WHERE DestinationSystem IS NOT NULL AND DestinationSystem != '' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY DestinationSystem ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {count} mission(s) with a named destination system accepted during the report period.
details.help: DestinationSystem on MissionAccepted. summaryOnly: in a by-system report the destination would trivially always match the current system.

tagLines: Destination system frequency analysis submitted to navigational records. No irregularities noted.
You kept going back to the same systems. The locals have noticed.
Your busiest destinations are the lanes you carved through the galaxy with your engines.
